api_provider: Tehran Stock Exchange Market Data (TSETMC CDN API)
api_response_semantics: Earliest observed closing-price record date (dEven) for the resolved insCode; used as first observed trading date, not official IPO/admission/listing date.
extraction_script_description: project-owner batch exporter: earliest non-zero trade day per insCode from ClosingPriceDailyList
note: Committed batch CSV is the normalized extraction output. Raw API JSON responses were not archived in this repository.

request_parameters.ins_code: per-row insCode column in batch CSV
